---
title: "Causal Discovery"
author: "Hansen Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# data_complete <- read.csv("data_complete.csv")
data_complete <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/crashes2012to24.csv")
data_complete <- data_complete %>% select(-X, -ST_CASE, -VEH_NO, -PER_NO, -CrashVehicle, -M_HARM, -YEAR)
data_complete <- data_complete %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.double), ~ round(.x, 0)))
# data_complete <- data_complete[sample(nrow(data_complete), 100000), ]
data_complete <- as.data.frame(lapply(data_complete, as.factor))  # add this
data_int <- as.data.frame(lapply(data_complete, as.integer))
```

```{r}
nlev <- sapply(data_int, function(x) length(unique(x)))
sort(nlev, decreasing = TRUE)
prod(nlev)
```

```{r}
dm       <- data.matrix(data_int) - 1L
nlev     <- sapply(data_complete, nlevels)
suffStat <- list(dm = dm, nlev = nlev, adaptDF = FALSE)
```

```{r}
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

if (!require("graph", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("graph")

if (!require("RBGL", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("RBGL")

if (!require("Rgraphviz", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("Rgraphviz")

```

```{r}
library(graph)
library(RBGL)
library(pcalg)

# ── 4. Run RFCI ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)
rfci_fit <- rfci(
  suffStat   = suffStat,
  indepTest  = disCItest,
  labels     = colnames(data_int),
  alpha      = 0.05,
  verbose    = FALSE,
  m.max      = 3L,                  # integer, not double
  skel.method = "stable.fast",      # required for numCores to work
  numCores   = 1L
)
```


```{r}
tiers <- c(
  AGE=1, DR_AGE=1, DR_SEX=1,
  DAY_WEEK=2, ROUTE=2, RUR_URB=2, RELJCT1=2,
  LGT_COND=2, WEATHER=2, VPAVETYP=2, VSURCOND=2, MECISSUE=2,
  DR_DRINK=3, PREV_ACC=3, P_CRASH1=3,
  VE_FORMS=4, M_HARM=4, VIS=4,
  PED_DEATH=5
)

vars <- colnames(data_complete)
amat <- rfci_fit@amat

for (i in seq_along(vars)) {
  for (j in seq_along(vars)) {
    if (i == j) next
    # Edge exists and lower tier -> higher tier: enforce i -> j
    if (amat[i, j] != 0 && tiers[vars[i]] < tiers[vars[j]]) {
      amat[i, j] <- 2   # arrowhead at j
      amat[j, i] <- 3   # tail at i
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# ── 6. Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(Rgraphviz)
plot(rfci_fit)   # original PAG before tier enforcement
```
```{r}
rfci_enforced <- rfci_fit
rfci_enforced@amat <- amat
plot(rfci_enforced)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(rfci_fit, file = "rfci_fit_1mil_2012_24.rds")
```
